iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order with valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting 60 ZUP when the cost was 40 ZUP maximizes profit. No improvement possible.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent offered 60 ZUP, and I accepted, which is highly likely to be accepted by them.
4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> clearly explains why I accepted, and the <message> confirms the acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have only made two proposals and am now accepting, respecting the turn and proposal limits.
</critique>
